calendar.matters:
Notice Of Application For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Carl L. Williams, Esq. of the L/O of Carl Williams, Tel. 415.440.1123, for Plaintiff and moving party;
Susan Griffin, Esq. of Griffin & Sullivan, Tel. 415.397.2600, for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CAESAR CHURCHWELL, CONCERNED MEMBERS OF PARADISE MISSIONARY BAPTIST'S Application For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus and For Declaratory Relief is denied for reasons stated on the tentative ruling. The parties are to meet and confer regarding the document inspection and that inspection shall occur by September 7, 2012. Plaintiff's request for an independent accountant/inspector is denied without prejudice. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Application For Issuance Of Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus
